description:
# Task

Fix Cargo workspace inheritance so the baml-bridge path dependency compiles.

Update `Cargo.toml` at repo root to include:
- `[workspace.package]` entries required by baml-bridge crates
- `[workspace.dependencies]` entries copied from `baml-bridge/Cargo.toml`, with paths updated to `baml-bridge/crates/...`

Acceptance Criteria:
- `cargo check` no longer fails with `workspace.package.*` or `workspace.dependencies` errors
title: Add baml-bridge workspace metadata to root Cargo.toml

description: [DSRs: crates/dspy-rs/tests/rlm_test.rs] Create integration test file with #[rlm_type] Item, SumItems signature, basic compile tests.

notes.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local
notes.content:
Plan (Task 7.1): create integration test (e.g., `crates/dspy-rs/tests/typed_rlm_test.rs`).
- Define `#[rlm_type]` Item and a Signature (e.g., SumItems) and ensure `TypedRlm::new/with_agent` compiles.
- Include smoke test for pyclass getters/`__repr__` if possible; mock agent for execution tests.

title: Task 7.1: Create integration test file
